The parts of the letter that are composed by the Dirt Bowl program are inserted so you can see how the overall letter will read.

nodes.text: hereby give My/Our permission for his/her participation in
sports and recreation activities.  I/We agree to direct My/Our child to cooperate and conform to directions and instructions of

I/We understand that there are certain risks of injury inherent in the practice and play of this sport, as well as in traveling and other related activities incidental to my child's participation, and I am willing to assume these risks on behalf of my child.  I hereby certify that my child is fully capable of participating in the designated sport and that my child is healthy and has no physical or mental disabilities or infirmities that would restrict full participation in these activities, except as listed here:
In addition to giving my full consent for my child's participation, I do hereby waive, release and hold harmless the

, its officers, coaches, sponsors, supervisors and representatives for any injury that may be suffered by my child in the normal course of participation in the game of basketball and the activities incidental thereto, whether the result of negligence or any other cause.

If the Parent/Guardian or Emergency Contact cannot be reached in an emergency, I/We hereby give permission for whatever medical treatment may be considered necessary by a physician or hospital for My/Our child.
You have successfully registered for this season's
Don't forget to send in your signed Medical Waiver. No player can practice or play
until their Medical Waiver has been received.
If you haven't already paid online, please send a check for $
Both the payment and the waiver can be mailed to the following address:
If you need any information about the season, you can always look at our Web site
at http://www.dirtbowl.com.  For dealing with personal information like reviewing or
changing your registration info, checking your team roster or schedule and the like,
use the link below.  This is your personal link.  Do not share it with others.
To save this link, click on it.  A Dirt Bowl Web page will come up, your personal page.
Saving this link depends upon which browser you use:
If you use Internet Explorer, click on "Favorites" in the Menu Bar at top and
If you use Firefox, click on "Bookmarks" in the Menu Bar at top and then
If you use Safari, click on "Bookmarks" and then "Add Bookmarks."
You'll get your team roster and schedule by email once they've been completed, but
they will also always be available to you on your Dashboard.
I'm looking forward to seeing you at the Dirt Bowl games this season!

or have your child bring it along to the first practice or game.

You can  manage records in the Recruitment List both here and on the Tawala Website in your MyProjects

Project Detail Page. The recruitment list is called "RecruitmentDB."  It is easier to delete records from the Web page, and you can also import contact lists there.  To import, try clicking on the import icon (
) to the right of "RecruitmentDB" file name and select an Excel or .csv file to import. The file must have the correct information in these five fields:
Child's First Name, Last Name, Parent's First Name, Parent's Email address, Phone.
